mapper.sql: select a.id, b.contract_no, c.customer_code as customer_no, c.customer_name, so_id, b.bill_no as so_no, seq_no, a.status, product_id, product_code, product_name, product_spec, draw_no, customer_product_no, unit_id, quantity_order, price, discount_price, amount, discount_rate, final_amount, quantity_delivering, quantity_delivered, quantity_subcontract, quantity_subcontracted, quantity_mps, quantity_manufactured, quantity_invoiced, amount_invoiced, priority, need_day, promise_day, a.remark, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time from ord_so_item a left join ord_so b on b.id=a.so_id left join cha_customer c on c.id=b.customer_id
mapper.select:
and a.id = #{id} and so_id = #{soId} and seq_no like concat('%', #{seqNo}, '%') and a.status = 0 and contract_no like concat('%', #{contractNo}, '%') and customer_no like concat('%', #{customerNo}, '%') and customer_name like concat('%', #{customerName}, '%') and product_id = #{productId} and product_code like concat('%', #{productCode}, '%') and product_name like concat('%', #{productName}, '%') and product_spec like concat('%', #{productSpec}, '%') and draw_no like concat('%', #{drawNo}, '%') and customer_product_no like concat('%', #{customerProductNo}, '%') and unit_id = #{unitId} and quantity_order = #{quantityOrder} and quantity_delivering = #{quantityDelivering}, and quantity_delivered = #{quantityDelivered}, and quantity_subcontract = #{quantitySubcontract}, and quantity_subcontracted = #{quantitySubcontracted}, and quantity_mps = #{quantityMps}, and quantity_manufactured = #{quantityManufactured}, and quantity_invoiced = #{quantityInvoiced}, and amount_invoiced = #{amountInvoiced}, and priority = #{priority} and need_day = #{needDay} and promise_day = #{promiseDay}
order by update_time desc

and a.id = #{id} and so_id = #{soId} and seq_no like concat('%', #{seqNo}, '%') and a.status = 16 and contract_no like concat('%', #{contractNo}, '%') and customer_no like concat('%', #{customerNo}, '%') and customer_name like concat('%', #{customerName}, '%') and product_id = #{productId} and product_code like concat('%', #{productCode}, '%') and product_name like concat('%', #{productName}, '%') and product_spec like concat('%', #{productSpec}, '%') and draw_no like concat('%', #{drawNo}, '%') and customer_product_no like concat('%', #{customerProductNo}, '%') and unit_id = #{unitId} and quantity_order = #{quantityOrder} and quantity_delivering = #{quantityDelivering}, and quantity_delivered = #{quantityDelivered}, and quantity_subcontract = #{quantitySubcontract}, and quantity_subcontracted = #{quantitySubcontracted}, and quantity_mps = #{quantityMps}, and quantity_manufactured = #{quantityManufactured}, and quantity_invoiced = #{quantityInvoiced}, and amount_invoiced = #{amountInvoiced}, and priority = #{priority} and need_day = #{needDay} and promise_day = #{promiseDay}
order by update_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into ord_so_item
so_id, seq_no, status, product_id, product_code, product_name, product_spec, draw_no, customer_product_no, unit_id, quantity_order, price, discount_price, amount, discount_rate, final_amount, quantity_delivering, quantity_delivered, quantity_subcontract, quantity_subcontracted, quantity_mps, quantity_Manufactured, quantity_invoiced, amount_invoiced, priority, need_day, promise_day, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{soId}, #{seqNo}, #{status}, #{productId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{productSpec}, #{drawNo}, #{customerProductNo}, #{unitId}, #{quantityOrder}, #{price}, #{discountPrice}, #{amount}, #{discountRate}, #{finalAmount}, #{quantityDelivering}, #{quantityDelivered}, #{quantitySubcontract}, #{quantitySubcontracted}, #{quantityMps}, #{quantityManufactured}, #{quantityInvoiced}, #{amountInvoiced}, #{priority}, #{needDay}, #{promiseDay}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from ord_so_item where a.id in
#{id}
